notableEvents.label: Andy Pages plunked
notableEvents.detail: Andy Pages hit by pitch. Alex Freeland to 3rd. Shohei Ohtani to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Will Wagner pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Will Wagner grounds out softly, pitcher Will Klein to first baseman Freddie Freeman.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Andujar GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Andujar grounds into a double play, third baseman Max Muncy to second baseman Miguel Rojas to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Ty France out at 2nd. Miguel Andujar out at 1st.
